flame_squire.name: Flame Squire
flame_squire.description: A young knight-in-training who wields a blazing short sword. Eager to prove themselves in battle.

evolution.flavor: After proving their valor, the Flame Squire is promoted to Inferno Knight.

tide_cleric.name: Tide Cleric
tide_cleric.description: A novice healer from the coastal temples. Commands the power of the sea to protect allies.

evolution.flavor: Through devotion and study, the Tide Cleric rises to become a Storm Priest.

mischievous_fairy.name: Mischievous Fairy
mischievous_fairy.description: A tiny, giggling trickster from the Feywild. Impossibly fast and loves playing pranks on anyone foolish enough to wander into the woods.

evolution.flavor: Having caused enough chaos, the Mischievous Fairy ascends into an Archfey Sylph.

lines.text: Hee hee hee! You can see me? Most humans walk right past!
lines.speaker: Mischievous Fairy

lines.text: I've been SO bored hanging around this village. Nobody fun to play tricks on anymore.
lines.speaker: Mischievous Fairy

lines.text: You look like you're going on an adventure! Can I come? Pleeease?
lines.speaker: Mischievous Fairy

next.text: Aww... Fine. I'll be right here if you change your mind! *pouts*
next.speaker: Mischievous Fairy

lines.text: Hee hee! I'm already in your party, silly! Let's go cause some trouble!
lines.speaker: Mischievous Fairy

alexia.name: Alexia the Ranger
alexia.description: A seasoned elven ranger who patrols the roads alone. Deadly accurate with a bow and quicker than anyone expects.

lines.text: Hold it right there. These roads are under my watch.
lines.speaker: Alexia

lines.text: I've been patrolling alone out here for months. Anyone who wants to pass has to prove they're worth the trouble.
lines.speaker: Alexia

lines.text: Show me what you've got!
lines.speaker: Alexia

lines.text: ...You're good. Better than I expected.
lines.speaker: Alexia

lines.text: I've been out here alone too long. Maybe it's time I had someone worth fighting alongside.
lines.speaker: Alexia

next.text: Don't make me regret this. I travel light and I don't take orders easily.
next.speaker: Alexia

next.text: Your loss. I'll be here if you change your mind.
next.speaker: Alexia

lines.text: I'm already with you. Stop dawdling.
lines.speaker: Alexia

zacharias.name: Zacharias Lightningsworn
zacharias.description: A cunning rogue who channels stolen lightning through gemstone daggers. Commands a gang of spark thieves with sharp wit and sharper blades.

lines.text: Well, well. You've got nerve walking into our stretch of road.
lines.speaker: Zacharias

lines.text: My boys and I have been running this route for months. Nobody passes without a fight.
lines.speaker: Zacharias

lines.text: Let's see if you're worth the trouble. Come on, lads!
lines.speaker: Zacharias

lines.text: ...Ha. You actually beat us. All three of us.
lines.speaker: Zacharias

lines.text: I'm not one to waste talent. Someone who can handle the Lightningsworn gang might actually be worth following.
lines.speaker: Zacharias

next.text: You've got yourself a thief. Don't expect me to play nice with the others.
next.speaker: Zacharias

next.text: Suit yourself. I'll be lurking around here if you change your mind.
next.speaker: Zacharias

lines.text: Still with you, boss. Don't make me regret it.
lines.speaker: Zacharias

aqua_monk.name: Aqua Monk
aqua_monk.description: A wandering monk who channels the flow of water through disciplined combat. Calm in battle, devastating in motion.

lines.text: Still your mind. The water does not rush — it finds its path.
lines.speaker: Aqua Monk

lines.text: I have been meditating at this spring for many moons. You carry the weight of a long road with you.
lines.speaker: Aqua Monk

lines.text: Perhaps our paths are meant to join for a while. I offer my strength to your cause, if you will have it.
lines.speaker: Aqua Monk

next.text: Then let us move like water — persistent, adaptable, unstoppable.
next.speaker: Aqua Monk

next.text: The offer stands. I will be here when you are ready.
next.speaker: Aqua Monk

lines.text: I am with you. Like water, I follow where I am needed.
lines.speaker: Aqua Monk

grove_druid.name: Grove Druid
grove_druid.description: An apprentice of the ancient forest order. Draws power from the earth and living things.

evolution.flavor: Bonded deeply with nature, the Grove Druid becomes an Elder Warden.

spark_thief.name: Spark Thief
spark_thief.description: A quick-fingered rogue who channels lightning through stolen gemstones. Found lurking on trade roads.
spark_thief.recruit_dialogue: Heh... you're tougher than you look. Fine, I'll tag along. Could use the coin.

goblin_firebomber.name: Goblin Firebomber
goblin_firebomber.description: A reckless goblin that hurls crude firebombs at anything that moves. Dangerously unpredictable.
goblin_firebomber.recruit_dialogue: Oi! You beat me fair n' square. Fine... I'll throw bombs for YOU now!

stone_sentinel.name: Stone Sentinel
stone_sentinel.description: A stoic guardian in heavy stone armor. Painfully slow but nearly impossible to bring down.
stone_sentinel.recruit_dialogue: ...You have strength. I will guard you, as I once guarded these ruins.

goblin_warrior.name: Goblin Warrior
goblin_warrior.description: A battle-hardened goblin that has survived enough fights to earn crude armor and a real blade. Slower than its kin but far harder to put down.

goblin.name: Goblin
goblin.description: A scrappy, foul-tempered creature that attacks travelers on sight. Too wild and treacherous to ever be trusted.

hex_weaver.name: Hex Weaver
hex_weaver.description: A timid apprentice witch found in the woods. Weaves minor curses and charms from spider silk.
hex_weaver.recruit_dialogue: P-please don't hurt me anymore! I'll help you, I promise! I know useful spells!

emberclaw_seductress.name: Emberclaw Seductress
emberclaw_seductress.description: A dangerous demon from the shadow realm who lures wanderers with enchanted flames. Masters of dark fire magic and impossible to resist.
emberclaw_seductress.recruit_dialogue: Hmph... I didn't expect to lose. Very well — I'll grant you my power. Don't waste it.

voidblade_succubus.name: Voidblade Succubus
voidblade_succubus.description: A fearsome demon warrior who cleaves through enemies with a blade forged from shadow and hellfire. Encountered only deep in cursed ruins.
voidblade_succubus.recruit_dialogue: You dare face me and live? ...I respect that. I'll fight alongside you. Once.

flame_squire_wild.name: Flame Squire
flame_squire_wild.description: A young soldier sworn to a fire order. Charges headlong into battle with blade ablaze and no fear in his eyes.
flame_squire_wild.recruit_dialogue: You're... stronger than I expected. Maybe I've been fighting for the wrong cause.

grove_druid_wild.name: Grove Druid
grove_druid_wild.description: An ancient forest hermit who speaks to trees and coaxes spirits from the soil. Slow to anger, but his wrath shakes the roots.
grove_druid_wild.recruit_dialogue: The forest shows me your heart. It is... acceptable. I will walk with you a while.

succubus_mage.name: Succubus Mage
succubus_mage.description: A demon sorceress who commands both dark energy and arcane flame. Her glowing orb holds the power of a fallen star.
succubus_mage.recruit_dialogue: How curious... you have power I can't explain. Very well. I'll study you — while fighting for you.

succubus_sword.name: Succubus Sword
succubus_sword.description: A blade-wielding demoness whose dark sword cleaves through iron and spirit alike. Ruthless in combat and impossible to outrun.
succubus_sword.recruit_dialogue: You actually drew blood. I haven't felt that in centuries. Impressive. I'll follow your blade.

tide_cleric_wild.name: Tide Cleric
tide_cleric_wild.description: A devout cleric of the tidal order who channels the ocean's fury and its calming depths. Healers by nature, terrors in battle.
tide_cleric_wild.recruit_dialogue: The tide wills it. I will lend my power to your cause — but I won't abandon my faith.

giant_bat.name: Giant Bat
giant_bat.description: A massive cave bat that hunts at night. Its wingspan can blot out the moon, and its screech splits stone.

orc_battleaxman.name: Orc Battleaxman
orc_battleaxman.description: A hulking orc warrior who wields a double-headed battleaxe like most wield a twig. Once he starts swinging, very little stops him.
orc_battleaxman.recruit_dialogue: Ugh. You hit like a rock troll. Fine — I'll fight under your banner. Don't make me regret it.

ork_grunt.name: Ork Grunt
ork_grunt.description: A rowdy ork foot soldier who charges in swinging a spiked club. Not clever, but doesn't need to be.
ork_grunt.recruit_dialogue: You strong. Grunt follow strong one. That is ork way.

ork_warrior.name: Ork Warrior
ork_warrior.description: A seasoned ork swordsman hardened by years of battle. Smarter and deadlier than the average grunt.
ork_warrior.recruit_dialogue: You fight with purpose. A rare thing. I can respect that — and fight alongside it.

wind_scout.name: Elven Bandit
wind_scout.description: A swift ranger who rides the gales. Scouts ahead of caravans and strikes from above.
wind_scout.recruit_dialogue: You caught me? Impressive speed. I'll fly with you — for now.

lines.text: Glad you stopped by, traveller. I've got a problem that needs someone capable.
lines.speaker: Village Guard

lines.text: A rogue who calls himself Zacharias Lightningsworn has been terrorizing the King's Road south of the village. Him and two of his Spark Thief lackeys.
lines.speaker: Village Guard

lines.text: Merchants won't go near that stretch of road. It's hurting the whole village.
lines.speaker: Village Guard

lines.text: If you can beat them in a fight and drive them off, I'll see to it you're well rewarded. What do you say?
lines.speaker: Village Guard

lines.text: Zacharias is still out there on the King's Road. We're counting on you.
lines.speaker: Village Guard

lines.text: You actually did it! The merchants are already talking about opening the road again.
lines.speaker: Village Guard

lines.text: Here — 120 gold and a potion, as promised. You've earned every coin.
lines.speaker: Village Guard

lines.text: The King's Road is clear thanks to you. Safe travels out there.
lines.speaker: Village Guard

lines.text: Ah, a young adventurer! Tell me, do you know about elemental affinities?
lines.speaker: Old Scholar

lines.text: Fire burns through nature's warriors. Water douses flame. And the earth swallows lightning whole.
lines.speaker: Old Scholar

lines.text: Remember this, and you'll have the upper hand in any skirmish.
lines.speaker: Old Scholar

lines.text: Welcome to The Rusty Flagon! You look like you've been through a scrap or two.
lines.speaker: Tavern Keeper

lines.text: Can I get you anything?
lines.speaker: Tavern Keeper

choices.text: I need to rest. My companions are wounded.

next.text: Of course. That'll be 25 gold. Head upstairs, second room on the left.
next.speaker: Tavern Keeper

next.text: Your party rests at the tavern... All HP and PP restored!
Well... a Spark Thief's been spotted on the King's Road. Quick as lightning, that one. But I hear he's looking for work.
next.speaker: Tavern Keeper

next.text: Defeat him in a fair fight and he might just respect you enough to join your company.
next.speaker: Tavern Keeper

next.text: Safe travels then, adventurer. Watch the roads.
next.speaker: Tavern Keeper

lines.text: Oh! You startled me. I don't get many visitors out here.
lines.speaker: Elara

lines.text: I've been gathering herbs along the forest edge. The ones near the ruins are potent, but... I don't dare go in alone.
lines.speaker: Elara

lines.text: If you're heading that way, be careful. Strange creatures have been stirring lately.
lines.speaker: Elara

lines.text: You know Sylwen? Oh — she must be worried sick.
lines.speaker: Elara

lines.text: I found a rare herb grove near the ruins and completely lost track of time. Please tell her I'm alright — I'll be back in the village by nightfall.
lines.speaker: Elara

lines.text: And thank you for coming all the way out here to find me.
lines.speaker: Elara

lines.text: Ah. You caught me staring at the road. I've been watching for my sister — she left for the ruins three days ago and hasn't returned.
lines.speaker: Sylwen

lines.text: If you happen to pass through... keep an eye out for her, would you? Her name is Elara.
lines.speaker: Sylwen

lines.text: Any news of Elara? I've been watching the road all morning...
lines.speaker: Sylwen

lines.text: Please — if you find her, just let me know she's safe.
lines.speaker: Sylwen

lines.text: She's safe?! Oh, thank the stars...
lines.speaker: Sylwen

lines.text: I knew she'd lose track of time out there. That's always been her way.
lines.speaker: Sylwen

lines.text: Thank you, truly. Please — take this. It's not much, but I hope it helps on your travels.
lines.speaker: Sylwen

lines.text: Received 75 gold and 2 Healing Potions!
Elara made it home safely, thanks to you. I won't forget your kindness.
lines.speaker: Sylwen

lines.text: You've got an interesting look about you. Like someone who doesn't know what they've gotten into.
A word of advice — not everything that fights you is your enemy. And not everything that smiles at you is your friend.
GRAK! You smell like trouble! Mog and his boys gonna smash you good!
lines.speaker: Mog

lines.text: Come on lads, get 'em!!
lines.speaker: Mog

lines.text: Bah! Mog not finished with you! Mog remember your face!
lines.speaker: Mog

lines.text: Run away! RUN AWAY!
lines.speaker: Mog

lines.text: Heheheh... my pretties are hungry. They haven't eaten since yesterday!
lines.speaker: Grix

lines.text: Get 'em, my darlings! FEAST!
lines.speaker: Grix

lines.text: No no NO! My bats! My beautiful bats!
lines.speaker: Grix

lines.text: This isn't over... Grix always finds more bats...
lines.speaker: Grix

lines.text: You picked the wrong road, traveller. Skrag Ironjaw controls this pass!
lines.speaker: Skrag

lines.text: Boys! Show this fool what happens to trespassers!
lines.speaker: Skrag

lines.text: ...Skrag underestimated you. Won't happen again.
lines.speaker: Skrag

lines.text: Next time bring more friends. Skrag will.
lines.speaker: Skrag

lines.text: STOP. You go no further. Urk's warband owns this land now.
lines.speaker: Urk

lines.text: Axes out. Crush them.
lines.speaker: Urk

lines.text: Grgh... strong. Very strong.
lines.speaker: Urk

lines.text: Urk retreat. But Urk not forget.
lines.speaker: Urk

lines.text: HAHAHAHA! A lone wanderer on Zog's road! The Warchief is PLEASED!
lines.speaker: Zog

lines.text: I've crushed knights, rangers, and sorcerers on this very spot. You are nothing.
lines.speaker: Zog

lines.text: WARBAND! ATTACK!
lines.speaker: Zog

lines.text: Impossible... ZOG DOES NOT LOSE!
lines.speaker: Zog

lines.text: ...This road is yours. For now. But my warband stretches beyond these hills.
lines.speaker: Zog

lines.text: We will meet again, wanderer. And next time, Zog brings EVERYONE.
lines.speaker: Zog

morginson.name: Morginson
morginson.description: A massive ogre warlord who has carved a path of destruction through the countryside. His iron fists have toppled walls and broken armies. Villages whisper his name in fear.

lines.text: You dare approach MORGINSON?
lines.speaker: Morginson

lines.text: I have crushed armies. I have shattered gates with my fists. Every village on this road pays tribute or burns.
lines.speaker: Morginson

lines.text: Whatever brought you here ends NOW.
lines.speaker: Morginson

lines.text: ...URGH. What... what ARE you?
lines.speaker: Morginson

lines.text: Morginson has not felt pain like this since... since nothing. Morginson has never lost.
lines.speaker: Morginson

lines.text: Go. Take your victory. But know that these lands are not safe — Morginson is only the beginning of what roams this wilderness.
lines.speaker: Morginson
